$comment: Machine-readable verb manifest - mirrors what 'pwsh ./pal.ps1 list' prints, but as JSON so any agent can discover the verb table without parsing PowerShell. Source of truth: pal.ps1's Run-List function. Drift-gated indirectly by scripts/run_full_audit.ps1 path-reference checks.

groups.title: Set up
groups.tagline: Get from a fresh clone or release zip to a working PalLLM.

verbs.summary: context-aware single-action advisor
queue-by-queue completion dashboard (full Q1-Q6 arc + autonomous baseline)
first-run guided 60-second tour for new installs
first-time setup -- SDK check + build + test + audit + dashboard
one-click: install mod + boot sidecar + open dashboard + launch game
cleanly remove the mod (preserves chat history; -Full to wipe everything)
dotnet build (Release)
dotnet test (Release, quiet) -- expects 1315 / 1315
full drift audit -- build + tests + 16 gates
drift gates only -- skip coverage / SBOM / packaging / tests
preview/remove generated audit coverage and build outputs (-Apply to delete)
scaffold placeholders for a new advisor / builder / validator / feeder / fallback / mcp-tool
dotnet run the sidecar in the foreground

groups.title: Operate
groups.tagline: Health checks, recovery, live diagnostics, and companion texture.

verbs.summary: one-shot probe: send 'hi' to a running sidecar and print the reply
30-second self-running tour across six fallback families
offline-capable companion REPL with ritual slash commands
in-character daily fortune, date-seeded for the day
one quiet ambient companion line
small self-contained challenge suggestion
short in-character campfire story
companion report from the night watch
manage personality packs (list / copy / new)
environment + smoke + delivery-replay diagnostics
sidecar smoke test against a running sidecar
replay a captured delivery envelope through the live bridge loop
live-Palworld watcher; polls /api/bridge/proof until delivery_proven and persists a durable artifact
apply the ranked HUD bind recommendation into config/native-hud.lua
package bridge proof + smoke + native-proof + HUD config into one validation bundle
archive runtime root + start clean
one-line current-state check
recommended model + quantization, serving policy, and live model-endpoint probe
open/show/wizard appsettings.json
measure real chat-turn latency vs HOT_PATH.md budgets; `pal benchmark cold-start` (Pass 360) times clone→first-chat path
wire PalLLM into an MCP client
download + verify the bundled llama-server release and extract to runtime-root/Bundled/llama.cpp/ (the 'bundled and default' engine)
wire PalLLM's inference path to a local engine OR a cloud API (Pass 357: `pal connect cloud` is the shipping escape path for below-reference-rig hardware)
export an anonymized support bundle
write one Markdown + JSON health snapshot from local evidence
summarize native proof state and the next action
recent activity: launch evidence + native artifacts + latest audit
single-command readiness checklist
check GitHub Releases for a newer PalLLM version (opt-in network call)
print the most recent CHANGELOG entry offline
build the release zip under release/
verify a packaged release zip / dir: required files, hashes, publish flags, publication-surface hygiene
local publication preflight: copy, paths, workflow pins, notice coverage
local AOT/trim readiness scan, with optional native publish probe
regenerate or verify the OpenAPI snapshot
verify GitHub Actions use full-SHA action pins

examples.$comment: High-leverage combinations an agent should know about. Order matters: each line is a self-contained one-liner.

lines.what: First-time contributor flow: SDK + build + test + audit + dashboard.
Quick drift check; no rebuild and no tests.
Preview local generated clutter; add -Apply to delete.
Full validation: build + tests + every drift gate.
Focused local publication preflight before tagging.
Static AOT/trim readiness scan before native publish experiments.
Read-only native proof status and the exact next command.
30-second self-running tour across six fallback families.
Wire the local OpenAI-compatible engine in one command.
Print or wire a raw llama.cpp llama-server GGUF lane.
Print or wire a local LM Studio lane.
Pick and print the right Blackwell vLLM recipe.
Print or wire a pinned transformers serve lane.
Print or wire a TensorRT-LLM lane.
Print or wire an OpenVINO Model Server /v3 lane.
Print or wire a Microsoft Foundry Local lane.
Print the live per-lane model-server checklist.
Write a no-prompt /v1/models + /metrics evidence artifact.
Wire the workspace MCP config.
Honest scorecard. No inflation, no hand-waving.
Structured explanation of any file: kind, surface, deps, docs, tests.
Natural-language query -> ranked file paths.
